1780220.name: Geranium:Tale of Dawn's Desire
1780220.description:
----------------------------------------
※ The current trailer shows prototype gameplay. Visuals and effects have been improved since then and are still being refined.

※ English support is currently undecided as the game is still in development.

However, the localization system is already implemented.

We will share updates on English support as we get closer to release.

----------------------------------------

◆ Story

A story about the journey of Geranium, a swordswoman who has lost her memory.

As the world's magical power fades, mysterious events are occurring everywhere.

Could these phenomena be connected to the cause of her amnesia...?

◆ Game System

This is a side-scrolling action RPG platformer where you explore various gimmicks and hidden rooms.

Create your own combat style by combining normal attacks, strong attacks, sub-weapons, and magic spells into stylish combos.

You can also craft new weapons and items by collecting materials dropped by enemies.
